untranslatable_reason: This is a cost adjustment rule for exit price calculations in position sizing equations, not a standalone sizing method. It describes HOW to modify inputs to existing sizing formulas (equations 2.10a/b/c), not which sizing method to use or by how much to scale positions. Without knowing which sizing method the author applies these adjustments to, and without specific numeric parameters or thresholds, this cannot be translated into an actionable sizing rule. This belongs in pre-processing of exit price data, not in the sizing decision layer.
